changeSet.author: Alex
changeSet.comment: Drop broken duplicate response action templates whose clean equivalents already exist (33→43, 36→38, 37→39).
changeSet.sql: DELETE FROM public.utm_response_action_template WHERE id IN (33, 36, 37);

changeSet.author: Alex
changeSet.comment: Fix typo (applicactionname) and remove malformed $($(...)) nesting in template 106.

changeSet.author: Alex
changeSet.comment: Fix bash nested double-quote bug in $(rpm/dpkg | grep ...) for templates 107, 108, 109.

changeSet.author: Alex
changeSet.comment: Replace tr ' ' '\n' (literal backslash-n inside single quotes) with a self-skip in the loop for templates 122, 123.
